name: tianjin-mahjong
description: 天津麻将 — Web 麻将游戏

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/server
